scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const target='test/config-service.test.js'; if(!fs.existsSync(target)){console.error('Missing test file: '+target); process.exit(1);} const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--test',target],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
